checks.name: schema_completeness
checks.detail: All required payload fields present: structured_prompt, suggested_tools, suggested_triggers, suggested_connectors, use_case_flows, full_prompt_markdown

checks.name: flow_integrity
checks.detail: 3 flows (Deployment Monitoring, Regression Detection, Rollback Execution) all have connected nodes with valid start/end/decision nodes and edges

checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: Webhook trigger has source+events config; polling trigger has cron+duration config

checks.name: connector_role_alignment
checks.detail: vercel->hosting, github->source_control, slack->chat_messaging all valid roles in connectorRoles.ts

checks.name: adoption_question_fitness
checks.detail: 4 adoption_questions added: slack_channel, github_repo, error_rate_threshold, auto_rollback

checks.name: default_value_coverage
checks.detail: All connector credential_fields have required flags and helpText. Defaults provided where sensible.

checks.name: prompt_quality
checks.detail: Identity: 78 words. Instructions: ~900 words with 7 numbered steps. Tool guidance: detailed API endpoints per connector. Examples: 3 scenarios. Error handling: comprehensive per-service strategies.

checks.name: safety_scan
checks.detail: 0 critical, 0 info. Rollback requires manual_review approval. No destructive auto-actions.

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity 78 words, instructions 900+ words with 7 detailed steps, tool guidance with specific API endpoints, 3 concrete examples, comprehensive error handling section.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: http_request, file_read, file_write all documented with specific Vercel/GitHub/Slack API endpoints. No phantom tools.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: Webhook for deployment events is the correct trigger. Polling for post-deploy monitoring is well-designed with conditional activation. Minor: polling uses cron field but is conceptually interval-based.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: Vercel, GitHub, Slack all have full connector definitions with credential fields, setup instructions, and API base URLs. Every service_flow entry has a matching connector.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: Prompt describes local file state management (deploy_history, baselines, rollback_log, warning_trends). Uses agent_memory protocol. Could benefit from more explicit memory scope guidance.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Per-service failure strategies: Vercel retry, GitHub degraded mode, Slack exponential backoff+fallback. Rate limiting respected. Malformed webhook handling. Rollback safety rules. Consecutive rollback detection.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: All 3 use_case_flows fully covered by prompt: deployment monitoring, regression detection, rollback execution. Flow graphs match prompt instructions precisely.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Clear business outcome: 'replaces four separate automation workflows'. Each execution delivers deployment status visibility, regression detection, or safe rollback. Value per execution well-defined.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: All tools standard (http_request, file_read/write). Vercel, GitHub, Slack APIs well-documented and stable. Connector auth types realistic. Minor: post-deploy monitoring polling mechanism may need platform support for conditional timers.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Significant reasoning beyond a simple cron: build log analysis, commit cross-referencing, regression detection with baseline comparison, rollback evidence compilation. Multi-step decision-making.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: No template variables defined (connectors have credential fields). Adoption questions cover the key user-specific configs. Could benefit from configurable monitoring duration and threshold variables.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: Could adopt with defaults for Slack channel (#deployments) and rollback threshold (2x). GitHub repo and Vercel config require user input (no sensible defaults possible). Good but not zero-config.

issues: No adoption_questions — Slack channel, GitHub repo, error threshold, and rollback approval preference should be asked
Polling trigger uses cron field but is described as conditional interval-based — minor semantic mismatch

template: Added 4 adoption_questions: slack_channel, github_repo, error_rate_threshold, auto_rollback
